members.label: other
members.description: black wall-mounted speaker or bracket high on wall
members.long_form_open_description: A small black rectangular device or speaker mounted high on the upper right portion of the beige wall near the ceiling. Appears to be a speaker, camera housing, or wall bracket; matte black surface with open cavity or angled front.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted near the top right corner of the wall, above the picture frame sign and to the right of the ceiling line
